Defendant Bank Of America, National Association Motion For Summary Judgment
Off Calendar Jan-29-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Bank of America, National Association's Motion for Summary Judgment/and or in the alternative motion for Summary Adjudication. Appearances: Greg J. Richardson, Esq., of Orrick, (415) 773-5822, appearing for moving party, Defendant, Bank of America; Richard Martin Rogers, Esq., of the Law Offices of Richard M. Rogers, (415) 981-9788, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party. Argued and The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS ARE PREEMPTED BY THE NATIONAL BANK ACT, 12 U.S.C. SECTION 24 (FIFTH). At Hearing, Courtroom Clerk gives each counsel a filed endorsed copy of order re: Defendant's Objections to Evidence. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/VC) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
